<script>
(function(){
  if (window.__fssPageJumpInit) return;
  window.__fssPageJumpInit = true;

  function buildPageUrl(targetPage) {
    var sample = document.querySelector('.pagi-nav .navigation a[href], .pagi-nav .pprev a[href], .pagi-nav .pnext a[href]');
    if (sample) {
      var href = sample.getAttribute('href');
      var rewritten = href.replace(/(\/page\/)\d+(\/|$)/, '$1' + targetPage + '$2');
      if (rewritten !== href) return rewritten;
      rewritten = href.replace(/([?&]cstart=)\d+/, '$1' + targetPage);
      if (rewritten !== href) return rewritten;
      rewritten = href.replace(/(\/cstart,)\d+/, '$1' + targetPage);
      if (rewritten !== href) return rewritten;
    }
    var url = new URL(window.location.href);
    if (/\/page\/\d+\/?/.test(url.pathname)) {
      url.pathname = url.pathname.replace(/\/page\/\d+\/?/, '/page/' + targetPage + '/');
    } else if (url.pathname === '/' || url.pathname.endsWith('/')) {
      url.pathname = url.pathname.replace(/\/?$/, '/page/' + targetPage + '/');
    } else {
      url.searchParams.set('cstart', targetPage);
    }
    return url.toString();
  }

  function jumpToPage() {
    var input = document.getElementById('page-input');
    if (!input) return;
    var n = parseInt(input.value, 10);
    if (!n || n < 1) return;
    window.location.href = buildPageUrl(n);
  }

  function bind() {
    var btn = document.getElementById('page-jump-action');
    var input = document.getElementById('page-input');
    if (btn && !btn.dataset.fssBound) {
      btn.dataset.fssBound = '1';
      btn.addEventListener('click', jumpToPage);
      btn.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); jumpToPage(); } });
    }
    if (input && !input.dataset.fssBound) {
      input.dataset.fssBound = '1';
      input.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); jumpToPage(); } });
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', bind);
  } else {
    bind();
  }
})();
</script>
<script>
(function(){
  if (window.__fssInfiniteScrollInit) return;
  window.__fssInfiniteScrollInit = true;
  var LS_KEY = 'fss_infinite_scroll';
  var THRESHOLD = 400; // pixels from bottom to trigger
  var state = {
    enabled: false,
    loading: false,
    nextUrl: null,
    container: null,
    currentPage: 1,
    seenUrls: {}
  };

  function $(sel) { return document.querySelector(sel); }
  function $$(sel) { return document.querySelectorAll(sel); }

  function getNextUrlFromPage(doc) {
    doc = doc || document;
    var a = doc.querySelector('.pagi-nav .pnext a[href]');
    if (a) return a.getAttribute('href');
    var navLinks = doc.querySelectorAll('.pagi-nav .navigation a[href]');
    if (!navLinks.length) return null;
    var currentSpan = doc.querySelector('.pagi-nav .navigation span:not(.thide):not([class*="pprev"]):not([class*="pnext"])');
    var currentN = currentSpan ? parseInt(currentSpan.textContent, 10) : 1;
    for (var i = 0; i < navLinks.length; i++) {
      var n = parseInt(navLinks[i].textContent, 10);
      if (n === currentN + 1) return navLinks[i].getAttribute('href');
    }
    return null;
  }

  function findContainer() {
    var firstCard = document.querySelector('.short');
    if (!firstCard) return null;
    return firstCard.parentElement;
  }

  function currentPageNumber() {
    var span = document.querySelector('.pagi-nav .navigation span:not(.thide)');
    if (span) {
      var n = parseInt(span.textContent, 10);
      if (n) return n;
    }
    var m = location.href.match(/\/page\/(\d+)/);
    if (m) return parseInt(m[1], 10);
    var m2 = location.href.match(/[?&]cstart=(\d+)/);
    if (m2) return parseInt(m2[1], 10);
    return 1;
  }

  function setEnabled(on, persist) {
    state.enabled = !!on;
    if (persist !== false) {
      try { localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, on ? '1' : '0'); } catch(e) {}
    }
    var toggle = $('#infinite-scroll-toggle');
    if (toggle) toggle.checked = state.enabled;
    var loadMoreContainer = $('#load-more-container');
    var disableBtn = $('#disable-scroll-btn');
    if (loadMoreContainer) loadMoreContainer.style.display = state.enabled ? 'block' : 'none';
    if (disableBtn) disableBtn.style.display = state.enabled ? 'block' : 'none';
    var basenavi = $('.pagi-nav');
    if (basenavi && state.enabled) basenavi.style.opacity = '0.4';
    else if (basenavi) basenavi.style.opacity = '';
    var pageNumEl = $('#current-page-number');
    if (pageNumEl) pageNumEl.textContent = state.currentPage;
  }

  function loadNext() {
    if (state.loading || !state.enabled || !state.nextUrl) return;
    if (state.seenUrls[state.nextUrl]) return;
    state.seenUrls[state.nextUrl] = 1;
    state.loading = true;
    var loader = $('#infinite-scroll-loader');
    if (loader) loader.style.display = 'block';

    var url = state.nextUrl;
    fetch(url, { credentials: 'same-origin', headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' } })
      .then(function(r){ return r.text(); })
      .then(function(html){
        var parser = new DOMParser();
        var doc = parser.parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
        var newCards = doc.querySelectorAll('.short');
        if (!newCards.length) {
          state.nextUrl = null;
          finishedNoMore();
          return;
        }
        if (!state.container) state.container = findContainer();
        if (!state.container) {
          state.nextUrl = null;
          finishedNoMore();
          return;
        }
        var added = 0;
        newCards.forEach(function(c){
          state.container.appendChild(document.importNode(c, true));
          added++;
        });
        state.currentPage++;
        var pageNumEl = $('#current-page-number');
        if (pageNumEl) pageNumEl.textContent = state.currentPage;
        // Re-init lazy images
        $$('img[data-src]').forEach(function(img){
          if (!img.src) img.src = img.dataset.src;
        });
        // Re-trigger ma-liste/progress hooks if present
        try { if (typeof window.fssRebindCards === 'function') window.fssRebindCards(); } catch(e) {}
        try { if (typeof window.fssCardProgressInit === 'function') window.fssCardProgressInit(); } catch(e) {}
        // Update nextUrl from the fetched doc
        state.nextUrl = getNextUrlFromPage(doc);
        if (!state.nextUrl) finishedNoMore();
      })
      .catch(function(err){
        console.error('[fss infinite scroll]', err);
        var info = $('#scroll-info');
        if (info) info.innerHTML = '<span style="color:#d44">Erreur de chargement. Réessayez plus tard.</span>';
      })
      .then(function(){
        state.loading = false;
        var loader = $('#infinite-scroll-loader');
        if (loader) loader.style.display = 'none';
      });
  }

  function finishedNoMore() {
    var info = $('#scroll-info');
    if (info) info.innerHTML = '<i>Fin de la liste â€” toutes les pages ont été chargées</i>';
    var btn = $('#load-more-btn');
    if (btn) btn.style.display = 'none';
  }

  function onScroll() {
    if (!state.enabled || state.loading || !state.nextUrl) return;
    var scrollY = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
    var viewport = window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight;
    var fullHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight;
    if (scrollY + viewport + THRESHOLD >= fullHeight) loadNext();
  }

  function init() {
    state.container = findContainer();
    state.nextUrl = getNextUrlFromPage(document);
    state.currentPage = currentPageNumber();

    var toggle = $('#infinite-scroll-toggle');
    if (!toggle) return;

    var saved = '0';
    try { saved = localStorage.getItem(LS_KEY) || '0'; } catch(e) {}
    setEnabled(saved === '1', false);

    toggle.addEventListener('change', function(){
      setEnabled(toggle.checked, true);
      if (toggle.checked) loadNext();
    });

    var disableBtn = $('#disable-scroll-btn');
    if (disableBtn) {
      var disableAction = disableBtn.querySelector('.disable-scroll-action');
      if (disableAction) {
        disableAction.addEventListener('click', function(){
          setEnabled(false, true);
        });
      }
    }

    var loadBtn = $('#load-more-btn');
    if (loadBtn) {
      loadBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){
        if (!state.enabled) { setEnabled(true, true); }
        loadNext();
      });
    }

    var scrollTimer = null;
    window.addEventListener('scroll', function(){
      if (scrollTimer) return;
      scrollTimer = setTimeout(function(){ scrollTimer = null; onScroll(); }, 80);
    }, { passive: true });

    if (state.enabled && state.nextUrl) {
      // small delay then check
      setTimeout(onScroll, 500);
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();
